payload.name: Auth Service
payload.text: JWT refresh tokens rotate every 15 minutes and are stored hashed, never in plaintext

payload.name: Search Ranking
payload.text: Hybrid search fuses FTS5 lexical hits and dense vector matches using reciprocal rank fusion

payload.name: Storage Engine
payload.text: The knowledge graph is persisted in a single SQLite database with bitemporal valid_from and valid_to columns for soft deletes and full history

payload.name: Redaction
payload.text: Captured text is scrubbed for API keys and private keys before any candidate is stored

payload.name: Embeddings
payload.text: Dense vectors use the all-MiniLM-L6-v2 model producing 384 dimensional embeddings

payload.name: MCP Server
payload.text: The MCP server exposes grafiki tools over stdio for coding agents like Claude

payload.title: Use SQLite as the single local store
payload.reasoning: Local-first, zero-config, and supports bitemporal soft deletes without running a server

payload.title: Adopt reciprocal rank fusion for hybrid retrieval
payload.reasoning: Combines lexical and semantic rankings without fragile score normalization

payload.title: Gate all writes behind a candidate review queue
payload.reasoning: Keep extracted memory untrusted until a human approves it

payload.title: Build the desktop app with Tauri v2 and React
payload.reasoning: Native webview, small binaries, and reuse of the Rust backend

payload.title: Onboarding guide
payload.content: New contributors run cargo build then scripts/smoke.sh to verify the CLI, HTTP daemon and MCP server

payload.title: Architecture overview
payload.content: Grafiki is a Rust workspace with a grafiki-core library, a grafiki-cli binary and a Tauri desktop app sharing one SQLite knowledge graph

payload.title: Security model
payload.content: The HTTP daemon binds to localhost only and requires a bearer token, and secrets are redacted at capture time
